features: 【Complete Set】Our clown costume accessories includes wig*1, bow tie*1, gloves*2. The complete accessories do not need to be matched, and can be worn out of the box. This rainbow clown costume set can easily create a perfect clown image and make you the focus of the carnival.

【High Quality Material】Our rainbow clown costume set body is made of high-quality fabric to avoid the cheap feeling caused by reflection. The color saturation is extremely high and can remain bright under strong light. This rainbow wig is soft, smooth and anti-static, and can be combed and washed repeatedly without knotting.

【Elastic Design】Our clown wig uses elastic straps for comfortable wearing. The special design takes into account different head shapes and is suitable for children and adults. The rainbow stripes of this rainbow party wigs are of moderate width, which is neither too exaggerated nor can fully show the joyful temperament of the clown.

【Lightweight and Portable】Our rainbow clown costume set is lightweight and can be easily stored in the accompanying portable storage bag. This rainbow wig lightweight and easy-to-carry design is suitable for travel, street performances or temporary events. It can be easily worn and start a wonderful performance.

【Widely Used】From Halloween parades to children's birthday parties, from shopping mall promotions to themed photography shoots, our clown wig is very suitable. Whether it is to create a joyful atmosphere or to quickly gather popularity, our rainbow party wigs can cope with it.
description: SPECIFICATION: Package contents: 1 clown wig, 1 bow tie, 2 gloves Color: Colorful Material: PET Weight: 80g FEATURES: * This rainbow clown costume set contains 1 clown wig,1 bow tie and 2 gloves. * Our rainbow wig is made of high-quality materials to ensure that it is not only bright and eye-catching in appearance,but also soft and comfortable to touch. * This clown wig is lightweight and easy to wear,and does not cause pressure on the scalp. * Our rainbow party wigs is suitable for many occasions such as halloween parties,stage performances,school activities and family gatherings. NOTE: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference.
